input.topic: Microsoft 365 device code phishing campaign reclassification and canonicalization
input.notes: The live `m365-oauth-device-code-phishing-2026.md` article describes a broad multi-victim cloud phishing campaign rather than a single canonical incident. Reprocess it into the appropriate collection with campaign semantics, preserve any victim-specific details for downstream incident handling, and retire or redirect the legacy incident slug according to site conventions.
